title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das of Yutori argues that most AI agents fail because error compounding across multi-step workflows breaks systems, even at 90% per-step accuracy. He contends the agent industry has normalized unreliability and that reliability and taste matter more than raw performance or code in the LLM era.
